base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_frightened_blue — a character from 1980 pac man. Frightened/vulnerable ghost — dark-blue body + white eyes + frowning mouth. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Frightened/vulnerable ghost — dark-blue body + white eyes + frowning mouth; 2-frame body-wave. All 4 ghosts share this sprite after Pac-Man eats power-pellet. Player can eat for 200/400/800/1600 points escalating
